body.u: At the end of May the day I leave. All excited and proud. In the morning I get up all tired and have something to eat then dressed I step out the door. In the dolldolequequeue embarrassed, I sighnsign. In the paper shop to by a paper looking for vacancies no hope yet one I’ll have a go at that. Home I run straight to the phone hallow is the job still going yes the man said, can I have an interview, Come straight away. Off I go for the job happy and pleased I approached the factory straight in The managersmanager's office. I was in there for some time in fact two hours. I stepped out and shouted plussplus jumping in the air. I rushed home and sat there all day and waited for my parents to arrive to tell the good news.

At four a clock They came in I’ve got a job start on Thursday. The job was packing asstantassistant it was worth the money all right for starters. When Thursday morning I get up had break fastbreakfast and was at work just beforbefore half eight.

Now Eighteen I was moved up to working the machines it was good money. I had found a girl friend who is seventeen we were going steady. After two years with her we decided to get ingagedengaged it was a great party. I was moved up again to machine mechanic it was double pay. I decided not to look for another job becidesbesides this one was paying off. Jayne had a job and we were saving for a house when we get married which we made plans for. We were getting on a bit when on JaynesJayne's twenty fifth birthday I proposed and she accepted and plans were made straight away. We were to wed in early summer. Our house was being bought 2 weeks before the wedding. Time soon went and beforbefore we newknew it we were in church it was great.

After a year of wed we had everything straightendstraightened out and the house was looking good. I was to buy a car and take a test when I went I failed first then passed second time. I was made foreman of our shop it came to quite a shoakshock. Any way {were?} to a baby boy and the is on its way. The boy is Daniel one year old. I was getting on a bittbit getting on for forty five. And I’m getting very lazy and the years went Quikquick. The kids were getting and David is in his last year and a half so they on theythe way to a giant surprise the same as I did.
I was getting ready to retire and Jayne but I’ve had my fun and games in the past and I’ll never forget them.
